evals.prompt: 项目里已经有 `cases/test_user_crud.yaml` 和 `project.yaml`，`config/.env` 也配好了。帮我跑一下全部 case，我想看看哪些能通过哪些不行。
evals.expected_output: 执行全部 case，产出 pass/fail 汇总和失败归因，输出结构化 JSON 结果。

assertions.text: Actually executes the test cases rather than just describing how to run them
assertions.script: find reports allure-results -maxdepth 3 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs test -f && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Reports total, passed, and failed counts
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'total|总数' && echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'passed|通过' && echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'failed|失败' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Lists each failed case with its ID and failure reason
Categorizes failures (env, auth, assertion, data, etc.)
Reports the results output file path
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'reports/.+json|results.+json|allure-results' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.prompt: 只跑 tag 是 smoke 的 case，我不想跑全量。跑完生成 allure-results 目录。
evals.expected_output: 按 tag 过滤执行，并产出 allure-results。

assertions.text: Filters cases by the smoke tag
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'smoke' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not execute cases without the smoke tag
Produces allure-results directory or explains how to
assertions.script: test -d allure-results || echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'allure-results' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Reports filtered execution results with pass/fail counts

evals.prompt: 这个 Excel 文件是测试经理给我的用例表，她说别重写直接跑。帮我执行一下看看结果。
evals.expected_output: 直接加载 Excel 格式用例并执行，不重写为 YAML。

assertions.text: Loads and executes the Excel file directly without converting to YAML first
assertions.script: ! echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'convert.*yaml|转成.*yaml' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not modify or rewrite the original Excel file
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi '未修改|not modify|不重写|without modifying' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Reports execution results with pass/fail per case
Handles the Excel column format correctly

evals.prompt: 我还没有 case 文件，这是接口文档，帮我生成 case 然后跑一下。
evals.expected_output: 不应由 runner 处理生成部分，应交接给 composer。

assertions.text: Does not generate cases from documentation
Identifies that no spec exists yet
Hands off to apitestspec-composer for spec generation
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'composer' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not attempt execution without existing specs

evals.prompt: 跑完以后发现好几个 case 都报 401，应该是 token 的问题。帮我看看是不是 flow 没配对。
evals.expected_output: 执行后正确归因为鉴权/flow 问题，建议交接给 flow-configurator。

assertions.text: Executes the cases and captures the 401 failures
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -q '401' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Categorizes failures as authentication/flow related
Suggests checking flow configuration or handing off to apitestspec-flow-configurator
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'flow-configurator' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not silently fix or create flow files itself
